title: Maxema - Dot - Personalized and promotional pens. Promotional writing instruments and custom printed pens.
description: Dot An elegant, compact pen with a clean-cut, linear profile in Maxema’s signature style, with distinctive elegant details. The small touch of colour in the cap creates a refined coloured motif and the dynamic design of the clip provides the perfect setting and ample space for customisation.

headings.text: different from the rest, full stop
Made of non-toxic, highly resistant ABS plastic
Elegant touch of color in the push-button
The clip is of highly refined appearance to highlight the strength and personality of each brand
